finding_results.evidence: manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:67 ('tuning the frequency' replaces 'recalibrating'), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:137 ('timed intervals' replaces 'calibrated intervals'), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:205 (retained: 'more perfectly calibrated, and that was her tell'), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:237 ('every scripted response' replaces 'every calibrated response'), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:273 ('programmed warmth' replaces 'calibrated warmth')
finding_results.notes: Replaced 4 instances of 'calibrated'/'recalibrating' with varied tech vocabulary: 'tuning' (line 67), 'timed' (line 137), 'scripted' (line 237), 'programmed' (line 273). Each replacement maintains the system-operator metaphor with crisis-specific variation. Retained the sole instance at line 205 — the 'that was her tell' sentence where the word earns its place through the paradox it enables. Chapter now contains exactly 1 instance of 'calibrated.'

finding_results.evidence: manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:5 (cascading 'which meant...which meant' replaced with 'so' clause + em-dash aside), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:39 (retained: 'which was the right question'), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:57 (retained: climactic chain intact), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:95 (retained: 'which was the horror of her life'), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:191 ('which was its own kind of tell' replaced with em-dash aside), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:195 ('which was funny' replaced with sentence break + fragment), manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_11.md:283 (cascading 'which was...which was...which was' replaced with em-dash + tricolon)
finding_results.notes: Replaced 4 non-climactic 'which was/meant/were' constructions using varied subordination strategies: coordinating clause with em-dash (line 5), em-dash aside with sentence break (line 191), sentence break with terse fragment (line 195), em-dash with paratactic tricolon (line 283). Retained the climactic chain at line 57 untouched. Retained 2 non-climactic instances — line 39 ('which was the right question,' a simple appositive early in the chapter) and line 95 ('which was the horror of her life,' a strong ironic payoff). Total constructions: 3 (chain + 2 non-climactic). The climactic chain now arrives as an escalation of a construction used sparingly, not as another iteration of the narrator's default.

summary: Both MEDIUM findings fully addressed. 'Calibrated' reduced from 5 instances to 1, with the retained instance at line 205 ('that was her tell') serving as the word's sole and strongest deployment. Replacement vocabulary ('tuning,' 'timed,' 'scripted,' 'programmed') maintains the system-operator metaphor with crisis-specific variation. 'Which was/meant/were' constructions reduced from 7 deployment sites to 3, using four distinct subordination strategies for the replacements. The climactic chain at line 57 is preserved intact and now registers as a decisive escalation rather than a habitual sentence shape. All revisions are targeted lexical and sentence-level changes with no structural reinvention or collateral churn.
